text:
Hello, Rong-En!
 
 My sincere apologies -- This was my goof -- I used the wrong
 supfile!  Please close the PR.  Thanks,
 
 -Rich
 
 
 On Sun, Nov 12, 2006 at 02:48:10AM +0800, Rong-En Fan wrote:
 > Please update your ports tree and try again. I can successfully
 > make index of the current ports tree.
 > 
 > If this does not work for you, please show your chinese/xcin25,
 > chinese/xcin contents and their revisions. Please also tell
 > me how you update your ports tree.
 > 
 > Thanks,
 > Rong-En Fan
